message:
fix(mysql,scaffold,docs): remove broken generated test, fix introspect, doc typo

MySQL connector.rs:
- handle_introspect: removed redundant serde_json::to_value(json!(...))
  wrapper (json!() already produces Value, wrapping it is a no-op with
  an unreachable error path)
- handle_introspect: enum serialization now uses serde_json::to_value()
  on individual enum values instead of format!("{:?}") Debug output.
  This produces canonical snake_case ("safe", "risky") instead of
  PascalCase ("Safe", "Risky"), matching serde rename_all annotations.

Scaffold generator (fwc new_cmd.rs):
- Removed test_operations_info_nonempty: it called
  connector.placeholder_operation() which is a private method (fn, not
  pub fn). Generated integration tests in tests/unit_tests.rs cannot
  access private methods, so this test would fail to compile for every
  scaffolded connector.

V3_Connector_Acceptance_Contract.md:
- Quick reference checklist was missing Forbidden from SafetyTier list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -341,7 +341,7 @@ New connector authors should study the exemplar for their archetype before start
     [ ] shutdown() called in shutdown handler
 [ ] RetryLoop for all HTTP calls (no hand-rolled loops)
 [ ] Typed OperationInfo for every operation
-    [ ] Correct SafetyTier (Safe/Risky/Dangerous/Critical)
+    [ ] Correct SafetyTier (Safe/Risky/Dangerous/Critical/Forbidden)
     [ ] Correct RiskLevel (Low/Medium/High/Critical)
     [ ] Correct IdempotencyClass (None/BestEffort/Strict)
     [ ] Input and output JSON Schemas
